---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Plaidify
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

*Example: "I'm always frustrated when I have to manually write connectors for every new bank..."*

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

- Which phase of the [product plan](../../docs/PRODUCT_PLAN.md) does this relate to?
- Screenshots, mockups, or links to similar features in other tools.
